What entities are present on the table and how is the presenter positioned?
canonical_answer: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair sits behind a white table facing the camera. A silver glittery board rests in the center of the table, flanked by a wooden rolling pin on the left and a clear glass jar on the right. White shelving units in the background display a red and green jester hat. Logos for School Projects and hobby craft are visible in the top corners.

Describe the visual sequence of events from the opening title to the final materials list.
canonical_answer: At 0s, School Projects text appears with icons; at 4s, VOLCANO text is written on a chalkboard; at 6s, a woman sits at a table with craft supplies; at 18s, a finished volcano model and materials list are displayed.

What does the person place inside the crater of the volcano model next?
canonical_answer: The person pours white powder into the crater using a metal spoon.
